Address     Code        Basic

0x00400000  0x00600f13  addi x30,x0,6
0x00400004  0x06400513  addi x10,x0,100
0x00400008  0x00000293  addi x5,x0,0
0x0040000c  0x00000313  addi x6,x0,0

loop:
0x00400010  0x01e30333  add  x6,x6,x30
0x00400014  0x00128293  addi x5,x5,1
0x00400018  0xfea29ce3  bne  x5,x10,-8
0x0040001c  0x0000006f  jal  x0,0
